matched_to: luxury travel advisors and corporate planners specializing in bespoke Nordic experiences

leads.title: Founder & CEO
leads.headline: •	CEO & Entrepreneur •	Innovator in Group Travel •	Founder of Veenus & Bowling Tours
leads.company_address: 8-10 William Street, Sir Henry Darvill House, Windsor, Berkshire SL4 1BA, GB
leads.company_description: Veenus is a UK-based B2B specialist that designs and provides experience-led travel for groups. They offer personalized, authentic adventures including luxury trains, river cruises, and heritage site visits across the UK, Europe, and South Africa.

leads.title: Owner
leads.headline: Chief Executive Officer at ECT Travel Ltd
leads.company_address: Lorne House, 76 Lorne Road, Bath, BA2 3BZ, GB
leads.company_description: ECT Travel Ltd is a UK-based tour operator and B2B specialist providing bespoke experiential travel for the trade, incentive groups, and events. They offer curated small-group tours, immersive workshops with local craftsmen, and full program management for UK and international clients.

leads.title: Founder & CEO
leads.headline: CEO & Founder of Not in the Guidebooks - CEO & Founder of Not in the Guidebooks - Raising EIS - Premium Authentic Responsible Travel Experiences for Independent Experiential Travellers, made Easy
leads.company_address: 30 park street, london, greater london, united kingdom
leads.company_description: Not In The Guidebooks is a B2B travel platform that connects agents with a marketplace of over 1,200 curated, immersive itineraries. They partner with local operators across 25 countries to provide independent travelers and agent-booked clients with authentic, off-the-beaten-track adventures.

leads.title: Founder and CEO
leads.headline: Founder and CEO of Tripsmiths
leads.company_address: 4 morie street, london, england, united kingdom
leads.company_description: Tripsmiths & TS Tours is a UK-based operator specializing in exclusive, expert-led tours and unique itineraries. They provide river cruises, rail journeys, and escorted tours, focusing on delivering high-quality experiences through partnerships with top-tier operators and professional tour managers.

leads.title: Co-Founder
leads.company_description: Eclipse Travel is an Australian owner-run agency specializing in bespoke, tailor-made journeys to remote destinations including Antarctica, the Arctic, Africa, and South America. They provide experience-filled adventures, small ship expedition cruises, and luxury travel arrangements for a global clientele.

leads.title: Chief Executive Officer
leads.headline: CEO Wayfairer Travel
leads.company_address: Temple 1852, Lower Approach Road, Bristol, England BS1 6QA, GB
leads.company_description: Wayfairer Travel is a luxury travel company specializing in tailor-made, customizable holidays with a focus on responsible and sustainable tourism. They design bespoke experiences across international destinations, with particular expertise in cultural immersion, wildlife conservation, and heritage tourism.

leads.title: Founder & Managing Director
leads.headline: Founder & Managing Director at Oenotated Travel
leads.company_description: Oenotated Travel is a luxury boutique travel advisor and custom tour operator specializing in wine, culinary, and cultural experiences. They provide private wine tours, guided vineyard visits, culinary classes, and artisan craft workshops for clients seeking specialized travel.

leads.title: Founder And Co-owner
leads.headline: Luxury  Travel Advisor And Co-owner Of Helentours Concierge Management Ltd. Expertise In Luxury Travel Already For The Last 20 Years. Passionated About My Work And Happy To Share My Experience.
leads.company_description: Helentours Concierge Management Ltd is a luxury travel advisor and concierge service specializing in bespoke ski, city, spa, and beach vacations. They cater to a global clientele, designing tailor-made itineraries across the UK, Europe, and the Middle East.

leads.title: Founder
leads.headline: Founder at Wild Nectar Immersive Travel Collection
leads.company_address: 5885 S Macadam Ave, Portland, Oregon 97239, US
leads.company_description: Wild Nectar Collection is a US-based online travel retailer and marketplace specializing in sustainable luxury travel adventures. They curate pre-built itineraries from values-aligned operators, offering over 200 journeys that support conservation, cultural preservation, and local economies.

leads.title: President/CEO
leads.headline: President of Tradesco Tours
leads.company_address: 885 W Cross St, Woodland, California 95695, US
leads.company_description: Tradesco Tours is a family-owned tour operator serving North America with ground operations in Europe and Southern Africa. They provide FIT packages, escorted tours, and personalized travel arrangements, including hotel reservations, local guides, and luxury safari itineraries.
